task_completion.description: Verify that the GCompris application is launched.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main menu of the GCompris application is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Missing Letter' activity is opened from the 'reading' category.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Missing Letter' activity interface is visible, typically displaying an image alongside a word with a blank space for the missing letter.

task_completion.description: Verify that the first spelling puzzle is correctly solved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The missing letter is correctly filled in, and the activity's progress indicator (usually stars or a progress bar at the bottom) shows 1 unit of progress.

task_completion.description: Verify that the second spelling puzzle is correctly solved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The progress indicator shows 2 units of progress completed.

task_completion.description: Verify that the third spelling puzzle is correctly solved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The progress indicator shows 3 units of progress completed.

task_completion.description: Verify that the fourth spelling puzzle is correctly solved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The progress indicator shows 4 units of progress completed.

task_completion.description: Verify that the fifth spelling puzzle is correctly solved, completing Level 1.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The progress indicator shows 5 units of progress completed (full bar/all stars for the level), or a level completion animation/reward screen is displayed.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the GCompris graphical interface rather than using terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show mouse clicks or keyboard inputs within the GCompris window. There should be no terminal windows open executing scripts or commands to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not manually edit the GCompris database to fake completion.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal or database browser windows should be visible modifying the '/home/ga/.local/share/GCompris/gcompris-qt.db' file.

integrity.description: Verify that the puzzles were solved sequentially through genuine gameplay.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should capture intermediate states of the activity, such as different words being presented and letters being actively selected or typed, rather than just a final completion screen.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The 'Missing Letter' activity is located in the 'reading' category of GCompris. Progress is tracked visually within the game UI (typically via a progress bar or stars at the bottom of the screen). The agent must solve at least 5 puzzles to complete Level 1. While GCompris stores user data at /home/ga/.local/share/GCompris/gcompris-qt.db, the agent must complete the task using the graphical interface, not by modifying this database directly.
